creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Philippe,
Thanks a lot for your information. I am very happy that gnubg has developed=
 so far and I am trying to work on an update of this port. One comment for =
now (more to follow probably):

You use bash in at least one of your shell scripts. Is this really necessar=
y? Here at FreeBSD, we typically prefer to have shell scripts that work on =
any shell, so it is preferred to use /bin/sh if possible. Bash is not insta=
lled on FreeBSD as a standard. So, if people want to install gnubg now, the=
y have to install bash as well.

Cheers,
Carlo

--
Carlo Strub
Ports committer=
